posts.author: sophiep1 (Sophie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am really keen to understand if a view of multiple boards on 1 single Kanban is on the development roadmap. I can see this has been discussed for years and theres apps that allow this but it would be good to understand if this will be native to Monday.com anytime soon?

Thanks,

Sophie (Project Manager)
